allow: Bash(node -e "const o=require\(''./data/orders.json''\); console.log\(o.length, ''pedidos''\); o.slice\(0,2\).forEach\(p=>console.log\(p.id, p.status, p.userId\)\)" --prefix "D:/SITE DE DOCS")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Copy-Item 'D:\\\\site doc arquivos\\\\LOGO-04.svg' 'D:\\\\SITE DE DOCS\\\\public\\\\logo.svg' -Force; Write-Host 'OK'")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-Content 'D:\\\\SITE DE DOCS\\\\public\\\\logo.svg' | Select-String 'fill.*#002|fill.*#FED|fill.*white|fill.*#fff' | Select-Object -First 3 | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Line")

Bash(cmd.exe /c "python -c \\"import re; f=open\('D:/SITE DE DOCS/public/logo.svg',encoding='utf-8'\); c=f.read\(\); f.close\(\); cols=list\(dict.fromkeys\(re.findall\(r'fill[: ]+\([#a-zA-Z0-9]+\)',c\)\)\); print\('Colors:',cols[:12]\); vb=re.search\(r'viewBox=.\([^\\\\\\"]+\)',c\); print\('VB:',vb.group\(1\) if vb else '?'\)\\"")
